codeReview.summary: The commit fully establishes the requested Node+TypeScript CLI scaffold: package/scripts, strict TS, ESLint, Vitest baseline tests, and `mors` bin wiring via `dist/index.js`. Implementation aligns with the feature description and expected behavior, and no blocking defects were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `mors-worker` requires strict TDD (failing test first), but this scaffold transcript shows implementation/config files were created before any failing-test evidence. The skill may need a documented exception or clearer guidance for initial scaffold features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session `051cbf4c-ce1f-48f7-a22d-16ea0af14b2c` shows Create operations for package/config/source files before first test execution (`npm run test`) and no explicit red-phase run.

summary: Reviewed feature `core-project-scaffold-and-quality-gates` at commit `e3198a0`; implementation meets scaffold and quality-gate expectations and passes review. Recorded one non-blocking shared-state observation about TDD procedure clarity in the `mors-worker` skill.
